calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-15-2017 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-20-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Phyllis Berenson for (administrator) Rosetta Howard.

The Court asked counsel if she had additional responses to the examiner's notes and stated that he has read the points & authorities. The Court also stated that it will need a new order with the revised amounts. Ms. Berenson stated that the court has the revised order and that she has nothing else to report. The Court took the accounting petition under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-17-2016 Continued To Nov-07-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-26-2016 Continued To Oct-17-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Receipt For Funds Deposited In Blocked Account
Off Calendar Jul-27-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Receipt For Funds Deposited In Blocked Account
Off Calendar Jul-13-2016 Continued To Jul-27-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Phyllis Berenson for (administrator) Rosetta Howard.

Ms. Berenson reported that escrow wired the funds to the 3 banks, 2 on Friday and 1 on Monday, that she has email confirmations, that the receipts were sent in to be e-filed but that it does not appear on the register yet. The Clerk was able to see that two of the receipts had been e-filed but not the third. Ms. Berenson stated that she will check with the clerks regarding the status of the receipts. The status on filing receipts for funds deposited into a blocked account was continued to July 27, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Receipt For Funds Deposited In Blocked Account
Off Calendar Jun-22-2016 Continued To Jul-13-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (67 Maddux Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94124)
Off Calendar May-26-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Phyllis Berenson for (administrator) Rosetta Howard.

The sale for 100% interest was confirmed at $750,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed 4/25/16. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond is not required as the funds will be placed into blocked accounts. Status on filing receipts for the blocked accounts is set for June 22, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
